name: Data Domain, Inc.
description: Data Domain, Inc. was an information technology company that specialized in data deduplication storage systems for backup and archive data. Founded in 2001, the company pioneered high-performance deduplication technology to reduce the amount of physical storage needed for data protection. Data Domain went public in 2007 and was subsequently acquired by EMC Corporation in 2009 after a bidding war with NetApp. Following EMC's acquisition by Dell in 2016, Data Domain's technology became a core component of Dell Technologies' data protection and storage portfolio.
